attacking_style: Sprint finisher who waits for finale rather than initiating early attacks. Executes final acceleration in organized bunch sprints.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to identify clear team leadout patterns or domestique deployment strategies across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Flat to moderately rolling stages suited to sprint finishes. No evidence of climbing prowess or breakaway capabilities.
vulnerability: Likely struggles on mountain stages and selective terrain where pure sprinters get distanced before finale.
key_patterns: Specialist sprinter with exceptional Tour de Suisse/Hainan record: 12 career stage wins

form_trajectory: positive: Continuing strong sprint form with recent stage victory, extending already dominant historical record
